raw_consumer_statement: 2 charges were made to my Barclay Card US credit card for {$86.00} on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX by a company called " Just Answer ''. I contacted Just Answer and was told that my membership expired on XX/XX/XXXX. I forwarded that information to Barclay Card US, but was informed that my information regarding the " non-charge, '' was not sufficient and the charge stands. The case number for my complaint to Barclays is : XXXX.
